song.title: O Walk About Walk About Zion
song.lyrics: [V1] 1) O walk about, walk about Zion, Go round about her in love. O walk about, walk about Zion And count the towers thereof. [V2] 2) O set your heart on her bulwarks, O set your heart on her walls, O set your heart on her bulwarks, Consider her palaces. [V3] 3) In elevation how beauteous, The joy of all the earth! In elevation how beauteous Is Zion, that city of worth! [V4] 4) O there is a river in Zion That flows so deep and so broad. O how the streams of that river Make glad the city of God! [V5] 5) Praise waiteth for Thee, Lord, in Zion, Praise waiteth, O God, for Thee, Praise waiteth for Thee, Lord, in Zion, For Zion is filled with Thee. [V6] 6) How great the Lord is in Zion, How greatly to be praised, How great He is in that city Which over the earth is raised. [V7] 7) O bless the Lord out of Zion, O let His praises swell, O bless the Lord out of Zion, Ye who in Jerusalem dwell. [V8] 8) The Lord bless thee out of Zion, The Lord bless thee o’er and o’er! The Lord bless thee out of Zion With life for evermore! [V9] 9) Behold how good and how pleasant With all the brethren to be! Behold how good and how pleasant To dwell in unity! [V10] 10) O tell it to all generations, O tell it to all who will come, O tell it to all generations, The Spirit and Bride say, “Come!”
